recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Dog Day Afternoon
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of would-be Brooklyn bank robbers John Wojtowicz and Salvatore Naturile. Sonny and Sal attempt a bank heist which quickly turns sour and escalates into a hostage situation and stand-off with the police. As Sonny's motives for

recommendations.title: Money Plane
recommendations.overview: A professional thief with $40 million in debt and his family's life on the line must commit one final heist - rob a futuristic airborne casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals.

recommendations.title: Bad Country
recommendations.overview: When Baton Rouge police detective Bud Carter busts contract killer Jesse Weiland, he convinces Jesse to become an informant and rat out the South's most powerful crime ring.

recommendations.title: Almost Cops
recommendations.overview: When an overeager community officer and a reckless ex-detective are forced to team up, plenty of chaos ensues on the streets of Rotterdam.

recommendations.title: The Newton Boys
recommendations.overview: The story of the Newton gang, the most successful bank robbers in history, owing to their good planning and minimal violence.

Inspired by one of the longest and bloodiest real-life events in police history, Officer Mike Chandler and a young civilian passenger find themselves under-prepared and outgunned when fate puts them squarely in the crosshairs of a daring bank heist i

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Stander
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Andre Stander, a South African police officer turned bank robber.

recommendations.title: 13: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: After losing his job, his car and his money, Phuchit, races against time to complete 13 tasks ordered by an anonymous caller who promised 100 million Baht upon completion.
